font.b: Recommended usage of SAP Cloud Identity Services for SAP Joule

div.span: The diagram shows the major parts of a SAP Joule integration from IAM perspective.

span.style: color: light-dark(rgb(31, 35, 40), rgb(205, 208, 212)); font-family: -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"; font-size: 16px; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));

div.span: The SAP Cloud Identity Services act as interface and contain the for the SAP landscape relevant human-identities and agent-identities. SAP Cloud Identity Services integrates with the SAP applications in scope in an SAP-managed way. This architecture is a key-pillar in the Agent Governance framework for an SAP landscape.
